Curriculum

Apprentice Operating Course

~14 lessons · 5 modules · worksheets · LearnHouse access. Education only — no profit promises.

M1 Operating Mindset 3 lessons

Outcome: Separate emotional execution from structured habits

  • Emotional-trading self-audit
  • Why systems beat alert chasing
  • Desk readiness checklist
M2 The 2% Rule In Practice 4 lessons

Outcome: Size positions using the risk framework — every trade

  • 2% sizing worksheet
  • Pre-trade risk gate
  • When not to trade
  • Journal risk fields
M3 Daily & Weekly SOPs 3 lessons

Outcome: Run the same before/after session process every week

  • Daily SOP checklist
  • Weekly review template
  • Setup documentation format
  • Trading journal workflow (learning — not P&L marketing)
M4 Automation Support Literacy 2 lessons

Outcome: Understand automation as support — not passive income

  • Automation overview (education)
  • Tool checklist — what you still decide manually
M5 Path To VIP 2 lessons

Outcome: Know when operating habits are ready for the private desk

  • VIP desk overview & accountability rules
  • Upgrade checklist — structure first
Fit check

Built For Operators — Not Signal Chasers

For you if

  • You want structure, SOPs, and accountability on XAUUSD
  • You'll paper-trade or backtest before sizing real risk
  • You know basic market structure and want an operating system around it

Not for you if

  • You want guaranteed profits, win-rate hype, or passive bot income
  • You chase alerts and won't run a journal or weekly review
  • You want financial advice — this is education only

We recommend 1–3 months of practice on the framework before increasing size. Outcomes vary; trading involves risk.

Questions

Frequently Asked

Clear answers on positioning, risk, and what you actually get.

Is Alpha Elite a signal group?

No. Alpha Elite is an education and operating-system community — structured trade ideas within SOPs and community accountability, not alert chasing.

Does the Gameplan or any tier guarantee profits?

No. All content is educational. Trading involves substantial risk of loss. Past results do not guarantee future outcomes. Not investment advice.

What's inside the free Gameplan?

The 2% risk management framework, a daily SOP checklist, and a 7-day operating sprint — one PDF designed to replace emotional execution with structure.

Does automation support mean a bot makes money for me?

No. Automation support means documentation and tools to help you run your own process. You own every trade decision. No passive income promises.

How do I access the Apprentice course?

After enrolling, you'll receive LearnHouse login details manually (within 24h SLA at MVP). Modules cover SOPs, risk protocol, and automation support literacy.

What markets does Alpha Elite focus on?

Education is framed around XAUUSD and structured desk workflows. Applicable risk and SOP principles are general — your broker and instrument choices are yours.

Do I need prior trading experience?

Basic chart and market structure familiarity helps. The Gameplan covers foundations; Apprentice installs the operating protocol. Not ideal for skipping risk education entirely.

Will you tell me exactly when to buy or sell?

No. You receive structured trade ideas and frameworks for education inside SOPs — not a signal service. You own every execution decision.

Are live walkthroughs proof of future results?

No. Case walkthroughs show how structure, SOPs, and review discipline are applied — education only. Past examples do not guarantee future outcomes.
